title: What Is Methylation and Why It Matters for Aging After 40
seo_title: What Is Methylation and Why It Matters for Aging After 40
meta_description: Methylation controls gene expression, detox, and neurotransmitter production. Learn how methylation changes with age and what women over 40 can do to support it.
tags: Longevity, Methylation, Epigenetics, Aging, Supplements, Women Over 40
